Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel And Or In The Alternative Protective Order Prohibiting Recording Dissemination Of Audio Recording Of Neuropsycholigical Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT THOMAS LEON's Motion To Compel And Or In The Alternative Protective Order Prohibiting Recording Dissemination Of Audio Recording Of Neuropsycholigical Examination Of Plaintiff is transferred to room 301 to be heard on the discovery calendar at 9:00 a.m. on the same date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Defendant Thomas Chan Leon'S Motion To Compel And/Or, In The Alternative, Protective Order Prohibiting Recording/Dissemination Of Audio Recording Of Neuropsycholigical Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andje Medina, esq. and Noah A. Phillips, esq. (415-988-9828) of Altair Law for Plaintiff.
Keian Vehedy, esq. (949-221-1000) of Bremer Whyte...LLP for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Thomas Chan Leon'S Motion To Compel And/Or, In The Alternative, Protective Order Prohibiting Recording/Dissemination Of Audio Recording Of Neuropsycholigical Examination Of Plaintiff is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Adrienne Rogers, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
